name: DuckBot Memory
description: DuckBot RAG + memory brain. 69 tools (brain_wake_up / brain_recall / brain_remember / brain_palace / brain_block_* / brain_graph_* / ...) plus auto-firing session_start and session_end hooks. Pure Node.js shim over the existing Python MCP server (src/mcp_server.py), single-spawn singleton via JSON-RPC over stdio.

pythonPath.description: Absolute path to the Python interpreter inside the duckbot-rag-memory .venv. Defaults to '<repoRoot>/.venv/bin/python' on macOS/Linux or '<repoRoot>/.venv/Scripts/python.exe' on Windows.

repoPath.description: Absolute path to the duckbot-rag-memory repo root. The shim runs `python -m src.mcp_server` from this directory.

defaultK.description: Default top-K for brain_recall when the agent doesn't specify k.

autoWakeUp.description: If true, fire brain_wake_up automatically on every session_start and inject the result into the system prompt. Disable if you want to manage wake-up manually.

autoSync.description: If true, fire brain_sync on session_end to write the session's high-importance facts back to OpenClaw's MEMORY.md / USER.md / SOUL.md.

timeoutMs.description: Per-tool call timeout (ms). Tools that take longer (e.g. eval, reflect) will return an error so the agent loop doesn't stall.
